name: GLM-4-Plus
note: Closed flagship unveiled at KDD 2024; official docs claim AlignBench 83.2 (99% of GPT-4o) and MMLU 86.8 (98% of GPT-4o), i.e. near-parity language/instruction-following/long-text performance.
verificationNotes: Confirmed real: release date 2024-08-29 at KDD 2024 corroborated by multiple independent news sources (aibase.com). Both result rows re-fetched from docs.bigmodel.cn and confirmed verbatim: AlignBench 83.2 vs GPT-4o 83.8, MMLU 86.8 vs GPT-4o 88.7. paramsB correctly left null/undisclosed — no primary source discloses size. No changes made.
